# magenta

Wraps its argument in the ANSI escape codes for magenta text.

## Signature

`magenta(_item: any) -> str`

## Examples

```rad
magenta("Hello")        // -> "Hello" wrapped in the magenta escape
magenta(42)             // -> "42" wrapped in the magenta escape
```

## Category

formatting

## See also

`red`, `blue`, `color_rgb`
